programme.title: Frasier: High Crane Drifter

programme.desc: Provenza once again finds himself in a professionally embarrassing situation when he discovers a dead body in the condo of a flight attendant he picked up while extraditing a prisoner. Brenda reveals her career intentions for Pope.

programme.title: The Closer: Heart Attack
programme.desc: Detective Ramsky has the squad investigate a series of brutal murders that may mean a Mexican drug cartel has arrived in the city.

programme.title: The Closer: Off the Hook
programme.desc: During a frenzied phone call to Sgt. Gabriel, a parole board member is brutally murdered. Pope announces his plan to improve the image of the department but, in order for it to work, Brenda must first solve the murder.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Tell Me Sweet Little Lies
programme.desc: Christina is hesitant to move in with Burke, and George threatens to move out unless Meredith gets rid of their dog. Meanwhile, Alex gets his board-exam results, Meredith takes a blood test for Alzheimer's, and Bailey begins to have contractions.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Break on Through
programme.desc: The nurses at Seattle Grace Hospital go on strike, leaving the doctors to fend for themselves. Meredith's mistake in treating an elderly patient is brought to light by the patient's friends. Meanwhile, Izzy treats a pregnant teen.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: It's the End of the World
programme.desc: Meredith's fear that she's in for a bad day when a medical case arrives at Seattle Grace that threatens the lives of everyone in the operating room.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: As We Know It
programme.desc: Despite the best efforts of Seattle Grace's staff, the code black situation escalates.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Yesterday
programme.desc: Someone from Derek and Addison's past arrives in Seattle and shakes things up. Meanwhile, Burke learns about Christina's secret. After a visit with her mother, Meredith looks into more of her family's dirty little secrets.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What Have I Done to Deserve This?
programme.desc: Meredith and George suddenly find themselves at odds at work. Bailey, although technically on maternity leave, finds herself treating Addison for an unusual feminine issue. Alex finds himself oddly jealous when Izzie pays more attention to Denny.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Knock Your Block Off
programme.desc: The MSO steps up to the challenge after larger-than-life Chris Block challenges them to switch to small tires and compete against South Carolina. With little time to prepare, Memphis must quickly adapt or risk losing to Block's mind games.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Small is the New Big
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content -- the MSO prepares to take on a long list of tough small-tire racers as they learn to master small-tire racing themselves. The team must learn quickly, however, if they want to stand a chance against the seasoned pros.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Small Tire Take Over
programme.desc: The MSO's big plans to race only on small tires is put to the test when Tim White and his small-tire killers from Illinois roll into town.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Race Night in America
programme.desc: First, Tim White from Illinois revisits Memphis with a big surprise. Afterwards catch the underground scene as racers hit the local streets during Race Night In America.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Back With a Kodiak
programme.desc: Diesel Dave picks his first giveaway truck and dreams big attempting to build the 2020 version of the Kodiak. Todd LeDuc challenges the guys to a desert race and flips the script by picking The Muscle to be on his team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Epic Fail of the Year
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. Heavy D is determined to finish the endless Fail of the Year UTV build.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Race Night in America
programme.desc: First, Tim White from Illinois revisits Memphis with a big surprise. Afterwards catch the underground scene as racers hit the local streets during Race Night In America.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Back With a Kodiak
programme.desc: Diesel Dave picks his first giveaway truck and dreams big attempting to build the 2020 version of the Kodiak. Todd LeDuc challenges the guys to a desert race and flips the script by picking The Muscle to be on his team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Flippin' Diesel
programme.desc: The diesel brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion. Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: Mineshaft Zipline
programme.desc: Zigzagging around a 17,000-acre ranch in California is a series of adrenaline-pumping ziplines. Ron and John take the adventure to another level by creating a Gold Rush-era-themed zipline, while John also carves a smoke breathing, eye-glowing tiki.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: Ozarks Showdown
programme.desc: Gunfights, fist fights and a flaming cabin. All in a night's work for the Shepherd of the Hills stage show in Branson, Missouri. The Daniels Wood Land crew adds to this historic attraction with a one-of-a-kind hillbilly shooting gallery.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: The Wood Life
programme.desc: Ron and John's mom needs an old oak tree removed before it falls on the family house. While John takes us on an insider's guide to the magic that makes this company one of the best in the treehouse and theming business.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: Hog Wild in the Heartland
programme.desc: After creating countless works of wonder from fallen Redwoods and metal trash, John Daniels and his crew launch their most extreme project to date. An Indiana pig farm wants a cartoon-style clubhouse in freezing conditions.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis. A big winter storm forces Noah and Rhain Alisha to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Out of Nowhere
programme.desc: Nicole and Azan have a fight. David's drinking concerns Annie. Andrei sets his rules for Elizabeth's bachelorette party. Luis worries about the death of his single life. Evelyn's family begins to see the real David. Josh's friend has doubts about Aika.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Brittany learns Yazan's family wants them married immediately, but she's hiding a big secret. Sumit's friends are concerned about Jenny's return. Ari's doctor is worried about her giving birth in Ethiopia. Armando has to come clean to his family.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Heart My Broken
programme.desc: Deavan has serious doubts before moving back to South Korea. Kenny has an emotional family dinner. Ari's family confronts her about Biniyam's motives. Jenny takes a leap of faith to be with Sumit. Brittany is Jordan-bound with a shocking secret.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: A Murder in Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erik Menendez himself shares in stunning detail the events of the week leading up to the murders of his parents and the motive behind the crime that shocked America.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: A Family With a Dirty Secret
programme.desc: The trial of the century takes a shocking turn when the defense says Erik and Lyle Menendez killed their parents after years of sexual abuse. Erik tells his harrowing account of growing up in the Menendez 'house of horrors.'

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Abuse Excuse?
programme.desc: Erik Menendez recalls his mother's decline in the years leading up to the murders and looks on in agony as his brother, Lyle testifies, vividly describing the abuse at the hands of their father.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Trials and Reversals
programme.desc: The first trial ends in a stunning surprise verdict. Erik takes us inside the prep for his second trial, his unlikely connection with OJ Simpson, and why he alone is left to speak for both the brothers as another jury debates life in prison or death.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Final Verdict
programme.desc: After the verdict comes in, at the last minute, Erik Menendez and his brother, Lyle, are sent to separate prisons. Erik marries and begins to mount an appeal.

programme.title: Elizabeth Smart: Autobiography: Part One
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart explains her story in her own words and provides previously untold details about her infamous abduction and nine-month nightmare in the grasps of her cruel captors.

programme.title: Elizabeth Smart: Autobiography: Part Two
programme.desc: Elizabeth tells the story of traveling to Southern California with her captors, their return to Utah, and her harrowing rescue with the help of 'America's Most Wanted.'

programme.title: The Killing of JonBenet: The Truth Uncovered: Her Father Speaks
programme.desc: Never-before-seen case details, including John Ramsey's response to the recent media coverage surrounding the 20th anniversary of JonBenét's brutal death, and stunning DNA evidence that sheds new light.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: The Work Life
programme.desc: Matthew and Abbi get to work so we can conquer the nine-to-five routine like a champ. Learn how to crush it with co-workers, find a path to productivity, and even how to drink on the job.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Taking Risks
programme.desc: From determining what type of risk-taker you are to knowing how your brain impacts risky behavior, this episode will make you an expert at taking chances.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Weed 101
programme.desc: Matt and Abbi get us high on cannabis knowledge by schooling us on all things weed. Plus, Matt gets high for science and then tests the best methods for sobering up.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Homewood's Where the Heart Is

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: It Wasn't in My Budget!

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets in the Stars
programme.desc: New innovations in astronomy and space exploration are revealing the secrets of our universe's most mysterious stars, and using the latest cutting-edge science, experts are rethinking everything we know about these cosmic powerhouses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Supernovas
programme.desc: The universe is expanding and so is our understanding of it. In this brand new episode, up to date information on the big bang is given. The universe grew from a point, smaller than an atomic particle, to the vast cosmos we see today.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars That Kill
programme.desc: The universe is home to real-life Death Stars that could destroy planet Earth. The latest science reveals the terrifying secrets of NASA's six deadliest: vampire stars, supernovas that can vaporize a planet, and unpredictable stars gone rogue.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Valentich/ Texas Blue Dogs
programme.desc: A pilot and his light aircraft disappear from the skies above southern Australia in 1978. In Texas, blue-eyed and hunch backed creatures have mutilated livestock since 2004.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Twisted: Killer Cousins
programme.desc: Cousins Waterfield and Gore hunted women in Vero Beach, Florida. Their perverse and violent acts resulted in the sexual abuse and murder of 6 young women before Gore was caught.

programme.title: Twisted: Twisted Tourniquet
programme.desc: Women in Virginia were told to nail their windows shut in order to protect themselves from the 'Southside strangler' Timothy Spencer who climbed in through windows to kill his victims in their homes.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: In the wake of a broken marriage, 28-year old Samantha Lezark's struggle to find love again has a fatal ending. Now, investigators must follow her digital trail through different chat rooms to uncover her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Killer Chemistry
programme.desc: Professor Tiffany Maher is a faculty favorite; intelligent and sociable, it's hard to believe that she could have any enemies. But when Tiffany is murdered, investigators discover a secret online life that may lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: November 2014, Tiffanie Adams' body is found in a field. A small town sheriff must retrace the expectant mom's steps to catch a cold blooded killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunter
programme.desc: When Kelli Bordeaux didn't report for duty at Ft. Bragg, everyone knew something must be wrong. The young combat medic would never go AWOL. A bounty hunter, working as a private eye, would then develop an unusual relationship with the suspect.reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the death of a young wife and wonder if she committed suicide to be free from a sham marriage or did someone in her husband's alleged religious cult want her dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A couple's mountain hike turns into a tragedy and the woman's boyfriend is charged with her murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Point Blank
programme.desc: Scott Rhode thought his wife Traci, was cheating and moved the family five times in thirteen years. When Traci met yet another man, 'a friend,' Scott called for divorce and custody of the kids but mysteriously died of a gunshot to the head a day later.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Risk-Takers and Renegades
programme.desc: It's a five-round battle to name the most badass of them all. In one corner, Evel Knievel, the original daredevil with the record for most broken bones takes on the People's President, Andrew Jackson, the Billionaire Howard Hughes and General Patton.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: It's the final five-round battle of the season to name who's the most Badass. In one corner, George Washington, our first President takes on notorious General Douglas MacArthur and Amelia Earhart takes on boxing legend Jack Johnson.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Vices and Vacations
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths surrounding our favorite vices and learn the facts behind some of our favorite holidays.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Home, Big Adventures
programme.desc: High school sweethearts are ready to take time to focus on themselves, travel the country and live the minimalist lifestyle in a tiny home of their own. They customize their 304-square-foot dream home with a wood stove, bed and full-size shower.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Techie's Tiny Home
programme.desc: A Texas tech guru brings his work home by incorporating cutting-edge technology into his tiny house. The high-tech abode features a biometric security system and a hidden computer that allows him to adjust the lighting, appliances and windows.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Traveling Nurses' Mobile Abode
programme.desc: Traveling nurses want to finish their tiny home build before their next assignment. The couple must work around the clock to complete the anything-but-ordinary home with its bright blue exterior, giant bedroom and built-in snake cage.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Tiny Winery Retreat
programme.desc: A business owner and wine lover always dreamed of owning a tiny retreat in wine country. She envisions her tiny home having a fully customized, Amish-crafted barn theme with room-to-room entertainment, wine inspired elements and a hidden kayak.

programme.title: Containables: Deadlines and Due Dates
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design a three-container structure in the Smoky Mountains of North Carolina. Dealing with tricky terrain and inclement mountain weather, the team enlists their families' help to install bowling alley wood countertops, patio doors and more.

programme.title: Containables: Containers of Staggering Size
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen raise the bar by taking on their biggest container home yet for a homeowner who wants a home where her entire family can bunk down and enjoy the amazing views her property affords.

programme.title: Containables: Stacking the Decks to a T
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen are eager to begin work on a very special container home that combines a unique design with the scenic beauty of South Texas. The home consists of three containers stacked to create a cantilevered look with multi-level decks.

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Deli-licious
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to fill our bellies with delicious dishes from the deli. He's checking out how the bagel met cream cheese and lox, why black and white cookies keep the gray away and when pastrami on rye first piled things high.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Layers of Flavours
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean layers it on thick as he digs into lovely layered feasts. He'll find out if club sandwiches were once for members only, how tiramisu tried to take coffee's job and why London may lay claim to lasagna.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Potlucky
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean enlightens us all on how the potluck got started. He discovers how the casserole began as just a pan, why chocolate sheet cake is a Texas treasure and when potlucks first became bring-and-share bashes.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Summertime
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to roll out those lazy days of summer the right way with our favorite summertime dishes! He contemplates if ceviche is really cooked, whether gazpacho came from the Good Book and what the cake in strawberry shortcake is.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tasting is Believing
programme.desc: Michael McKean reveals the flavours we hold near and dear are not always what they appear. He'll show us how apple pie could go crackers, why seaweed is giving bacon a run for its money and how texture can totally determine taste.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Where's Mickey? / Cuckoo in Hot Dog Hills!
programme.desc: Mickey helps Mayor McBeagle install a Flammer Jammer into his car. Cuckoo Loca's cousins visit from Paris.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: No Laughing Matter/ Puppy for a Day
programme.desc: Fozzie loses his Great Uncle Schnozzie's Jokebook and is convinced he can't be funny without it. The Muppets try to convince Miss Nanny that they're ready for a puppy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Movie: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: After stealing a dollar from his girlfriend's child, a minor league hockey player is ordered to fill the role of the Tooth Fairy. While bumbling through the process, he rediscovers his childhood dreams and learns how to follow his heart.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut

programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Secret Box/ Band Geeks

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes
programme.desc: When Daphne's ex-fiancé comes to visit, she quickly introduces him to her 'new husband,' Niles. Martin stirs up trouble when he decides to introduce Roz as Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: Love Bites the Dog
programme.desc: Roz sets Frasier up with a gorgeous woman, who takes a shine to Bulldog instead. But when she dumps him, Bulldog becomes so distraught that Frasier has to take over his show. Meanwhile, Niles places an ad to attract more patients.

programme.title: Frasier: The Impossible Dream

programme.title: Frasier: A Crane's Critique
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are ecstatic when Martin becomes good friends with a reclusive author. Trouble ensues when they discover the author's new manuscript.

programme.title: Frasier: Head Games
programme.desc: Niles' brief session with a slumping basketball star turns the athlete's fortunes around. He is soon mortified to learn that the player believes his good luck is not due to Niles' advice, but to Niles' hair.

programme.desc: Lucy snares a big part in a motion picture, and vows to make her death scene the best.

programme.desc: Lucy is eager to contribute to a fashion show featuring the wives of motion picture stars.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Hedda Hopper Story

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: It's In Your Brain
programme.desc: Doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spent months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: The Strange Case of Dr. Gilmer
programme.desc: A beloved physician to commits a violent murder and a doctor investigates whether a rare disease could have driven them to do it.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: All on the Line: Gut Punch
programme.desc: Captain Johnny gets off to a hot start with a jumbo tuna, but everything changes when all fishing is shut down. To make up for lost time, the Subdivider and Julia Nicole gamble on new grounds.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as captains and crew brace for the loss of friends during a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line, and the clock is ticking for Wild Bill and Junior during the cod derby.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.desc: Captain Johnny gets off to a hot start with a jumbo tuna, but everything changes when all fishing is shut down. To make up for lost time, the Subdivider and Julia Nicole gamble on new grounds.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as captains and crew brace for the loss of friends during a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line, and the clock is ticking for Wild Bill and Junior during the cod derby.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Spoils of War
programme.desc: It's judgement day on Parker and Todd's 100-ounce bet. Parker chases a record breaking 7.2 million dollar season total. Todd desperately tries to stop his crew from falling apart. Tony struggles to get his dredge to Dawson before the Yukon River freezes.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Second Thoughts

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The O'Briens

programme.title: Young Dylan: Plain Faces
programme.desc: Dylan doesn't want to attend school, and does whatever it takes to avoid going, including convincing little Charlie not to go, either.

programme.title: The Loud House: Along Came a Sister/ Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln causes trouble when he loses the class tarantula during his turn taking care of it. Lincoln declares a strike until he can convince someone to switch chores with him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Young Dylan arrives at his relatives' home needing a place to live, but his streetwise swagger upends the conservative Wilson household.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chatterbox Gary/ Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Buried in Time/ Enchanted Tiki Dream
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a dream world for Squidward; The gang is caught in a time capsule.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Pediatrician
programme.desc: Rachel's non-stop calls to Emma's pediatrician force the doctor to drop her as a patient.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Male Nanny
programme.desc: A jealous Ross mocks Rachel's choice of an over-sensitive male nanny for baby Emma.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey discover a videotape featuring Monica in compromising positions.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Phone Number
programme.desc: Rachel immediately regrets giving her phone number out to a guy she meets while out with Phoebe. Meanwhile, when Chandler lies about having to work so he can spend time with Monica, Joey suspects Monica is cheating on Chandler.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: Rachel makes a rash decision when she finds a handsome temp filling in for her at work.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Phoebe's Rats
programme.desc: Rachel is steamed when she learns that Monica invited her workplace rival to her party.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Monica Sings
programme.desc: Monica sings at a karaoke bar and is very exposed; Rachel and Gavin kiss.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blind Dates
programme.desc: In the hope of reuniting Ross and Rachel, Joey and Phoebe set them up on bad blind dates.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Mugging
programme.desc: Joey stumbles upon an unusual method of acting in order to impress a famous fellow actor.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute
programme.desc: Christy annoys everyone when she adopts her new boyfriend Brad's healthy lifestyle, and Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Mom: A Cricket and a Hedge Made of Gold
programme.desc: When Marjorie takes a break from the group, Bonnie becomes the go-to for everyone's problems and Christy tries to overcome a painful memory from her past.

programme.title: Mom: A Few Thongs and a Hawaiian Funeral
programme.desc: Christy and Jill take Emily to see her biological mother in rehab where they make a surprising discovery, and Bonnie watches Adam's dog while he's out of town.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Uses His Vato Power to Save Dinero Que La
programme.desc: George and Angie make a bet to determine who can live the most frugally.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Rocks to the Max and Gets Diss-Band-ed
programme.desc: In an episode directed by award-winning film actor, Andy Garcia, George tries to relive his high school days by teaching Max to play the guitar, but when Max moves on without his dad and joins a rock band, George wishes he could take it all back.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Smoking Mad at Benny and Develops an Oral Fixation
programme.desc: When Power Aviation institutes a smoking ban, Benny's nicotine withdrawals drive George to self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: Full House: A Very Tanner Christmas
programme.desc: Rebecca is nostalgic for a midwestern Christmas and Danny longs for his girlfriend, Vicky.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Pool Day/ Circus Pup Formers
programme.desc: The pups head to the water park on a hot day, but they have to fix the water tower if they want to swim. Later, Ryder and the Paw Patrol put on an impromptu circus in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a City Kitty/ Pups Save a Cloud Surfer
programme.desc: Cali gets lost in the woods; Daring Danny X's harness loosens while kite-surfing.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Super Baby!
programme.desc: When supervillain Ms. Goo Goo starts changing everyone into babies, it’s up to Guppy Girl and Bubble Boy to stop her before they get turned into babies too.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Dolphin Is a Guppy's Best Friend!
programme.desc: Molly and Gil meet Buddy, a baby dolphin with the friendliest face in the sea. Today is Buddy's first birthday, and his pod is throwing him a surprise birthday party.

programme.desc: Blue has something exciting to tell everybody. In this game of Blue’s Clues, Josh and the viewer go on a note finding quest, solving riddles, and following treasure maps to find out the answer to Blue's big news.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Sea Patrol: Pups Save Tilly Turbot/ Pups Save an Upset Elephant
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must rescue Cap'n Turbot and Francois' Grandma Tilly after she rides off on a dolphin. Carlos and Tracker call the PAW Patrol to help solve the mystery of a rumbling sound that's upsetting the jungle elephants.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Friend/ Pups Save a Stowaway
programme.desc: It's two rescues rolled into one when the pups locate a missing Marshall trying to save a bunny and her family. The pups have to rescue a run-away kitty on a run-away Snow Cat.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Humsquatch / Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. A robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save the Tigers
programme.desc: When searching for elusive rumble top tigers, the Turbots fall into a cave deep inside a volcano. The PAW Patrol does a paratrooper style rescue from Skye's Ultimate copter in this Ultimate Aviator Rescue.

programme.desc: When The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more. SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton is following their every step.
