programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Curtis
programme.desc: On April 10, 1995, in Aurora, Colorado, 15-year-old Curtis was one of four teens involved in the death of Christopher as they attempted to steal his car. After 23 years in jail, Curtis has been granted a resentencing and could soon be released.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby shot girlfriend Krissi's mother and father as they slept in their home in Frisco, Texas. The mother died, but the father survived. Bobby was sentenced to life despite claims he was manipulated into committing the murder.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Aaron
programme.desc: On January 31, 2011, 14-year-old Aaron shot his neighbor, 14-year-old Alana, in her home in Harlem, Georgia. Aaron was sentenced to life without parole at 15, but now 21-year-old Aaron is appealing his sentence.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Brandon
programme.desc: On August 21, 2001, a group of teens, including 15-year-old Brandon, kidnapped and raped Melissa, a 21-year-old college student in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Preston
programme.desc: On March 4, 2010, 17-year-old Preston was one of three teens involved in a murder during an attempted robbery in Fort Walton Beach, Florida. Along with the other teens, Preston was sentenced to life without parole.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Otis
programme.desc: On March 31, 1998 in Albany, Georgia, 16-year-old Otis broke into Valerie's home and allegedly tried to rob her. During the attempt, Valerie and her 16-year-old daughter, Valene, were shot. Valerie dies weeks later and her daughter was disfigured.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: James
programme.desc: On November 24, 1990, 15-year-old James killed his stepmother and three young brothers with a shotgun, and then set their rural Wyoming home on fire.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Ronald
programme.desc: On February 2, 1999, 17-year-old Ronald and two other teens sought to retaliate against Cordell for an alleged sexual assault ultimately burning him alive in the woods of Fort Walton Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: Emma Willmann coaches Mary on her comedy routine ahead of the big show. Dale confides a secret to Mary, and asks for a chance to perform at the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatchin' in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: The team is in Florida meeting up with local expert Stacy Brown Jr. in the notorious Bigfoot spot, Myakka River State Park. Relying on Stacy's knowledge, the team meet with witnesses with a spooky video of a bigfoot near the Myakka River.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatchsploitation
programme.desc: The team returns to Louisiana to investigate a Bigfoot hot spot, Caddo Lake. After the team reminisces about the 1970s monster films shot at this location, they meet with witnesses and finally head out on an eventful night investigation on the bayou.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot State of Mind
programme.desc: The team traverses the Adirondacks of New York to investigate Whitehall, where an area Bigfoot expert recounts historic sightings and reveals recent reports. The team enlists the help of local police, hopeful the men in blue can catch a fugitive Bigfoot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatch Wars: U.S. vs. Canada
programme.desc: The team returns to the Pacific Northwest to settle a bet of whether the U.S. or Canada is squatchier. After they split up to meet witnesses and do night investigations, they try to discover whether the Olympic Peninsula or British Columbia is squatchier.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot's Maine Event
programme.desc: The team travels to Maine for the first time. They split up to interview eyewitnesses and embark on multiple solo investigations. Matt records multiple bigfoot howls, and is confident they've pinned down a Pine Tree State Sasquatch.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: The Booger Hole
programme.desc: The team is in Mississippi for the first time to meet with a BFRO investigator, who's investigating bigfoot reports in a new way. As they follow up with eyewitnesses, they become privy to a secret spot where they are guaranteed to get bigfoot action.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Return to Four Corners
programme.desc: The team returns to the Four Corners of America to find all their previous witnesses have been plagued by recent activity.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: Squatching in a Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: The team travels to Eastern Washington and the Blue Mountains to meet with Professor Jeff Meldrum where he discovered the tracks of a possible Bigfoot. With accounts going back for fifty years, the team is optimistic about finding something in the woods.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Further Evidence: Squatchiest State Contest
programme.desc: Find out what the team thinks as they head to the Pacific Northwest to determine the squatchiest state in the U.S. May the squatchiest state win.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: The Secret Squatch Spot
programme.desc: The team heads to the seldom squatched state of South Carolina to investigate a video of a strange track-way. As more witnesses share their encounters, they split up and hone in on an active area, which leads to an action-packed final night.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Squatchin' in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: The team is in Florida meeting up with local expert Stacy Brown Jr. in the notorious Bigfoot spot, Myakka River State Park. Relying on Stacy's knowledge, the team meet with witnesses with a spooky video of a bigfoot near the Myakka River.

programme.title: Vet Gone Wild: Into the Lion's Den
programme.desc: Dr. Chris is called to South Africa where he must perform surgery on a trio of lionesses. While there, he helps de-horn an endangered white rhino to keep the poachers away and races to replace the tracking collar on a female elephant.

programme.title: Vet Gone Wild: Wild Tasmanian Devils
programme.desc: In Tasmania, endangered Tasmanian Devils have been dying from a rare form of cancer and Dr. Chris must help save them from extinction. He also helps rescue an injured pademelon, and then helps wombats suffering from severe cases of mange.

programme.title: Vet Gone Wild: Cheetahs of the Desert
programme.desc: Dr. Chris visits Namibia where he works with the cheetah population at the N/a'an Ku Se Wildlife Sanctuary and also visits a baboon who may have brain trauma. Later, Chris gives a health check to some meerkats before releasing them back to the wild.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne is tasked at removing a six-pound mass from a small dog, Dr. Blue and wife welcome their first daughter to the family. The vets make a house call to a llama that's causing some drama. Dr. Ross extracts a whopping 14 teeth from a mini poodle.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pomeranian Plot Twist
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne sees a surprise on an x-ray of one of his favorite patients, while Dr. Ross flexes his exotic vet chops with a fennec fox and a kinkajou with a highly contagious infection. Dr. Blue has his hands full with a former frat house pig named Aubie.

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Boy Who Spayed Wolf
programme.desc: After a howling fun father-son trip with his boys, Dr. Blue recruits Dr. Ross to tackle two wolf spays at a local sanctuary. Dr. Lavigne performs a bionic surgery on a pit bull with a torn ACL. New vet Dr. Fedke treats a cat with a creepy, crawly injury.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Pig Whisperers
programme.desc: Dr. Blue takes on an urgent case after a pit bull suffers a raccoon attack. Dr. Ross takes on an aggressive ferret, and the vets test out their pig whispering skills at an animal rescue. The doctors have a surprise announcement for their wives.

programme.title: The Vet Life: 16-Pound Tumour
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne performs a risky surgery on a loving pit bull with a record-breaking tumour. Dr. Ross examines a rescue pigeon turned pet and an aspiring vet student joins Dr. Blue at Cy-Fair. The doctors deal with a heartbreaking situation at the clinic.

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Tale of Two Tails
programme.desc: Dr. Blue has a crisis on his hands with a dog that has chewed off her own tail, while Dr. Ross treats a reptile that might need a tail amputation. Dr. Lavigne helps Sutter Butter, a cat rescued from being thrown out of a car, and is now having seizures.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hog House Call
programme.desc: Bubby Cook, a beloved Basset Hound, has a condition that could complicate surgery for Dr. Ross. Dr. Blue has a hog house call, and Dr. Lavigne has concerns over his vet tech assisting with an operation on her own dog. A blackout creates chaos at Cy-Fair.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Alligator Showdown

programme.title: Good Bones: Little White House on a Hill

programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a crumbling house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood, only to find out it's the first house they can't save. With a clean slate, Mina designs a white beauty with new buyers in mind.

programme.desc: Mina and Steve think it's time to renovate a rental property they purchased three years ago so they can sell it for Jack's college fund. Karen and Mina formulate a plan to transform the house into an urban Hampton's retreat with marble and wood shingles.

programme.title: Good Bones: Down to the Studs: Shiplap Surprise in Fountain Square
programme.desc: Mina and Karen revamp a tiny but pricey two-bedroom home on a tight budget. They build additional bedrooms and reconfigure the floor plan to increase functionality. When their contractor mistakenly covers every wall in shiplap, they find design solutions.

programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: House Hunters: From His House to Their House
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple looks to buy their first home together on Amelia Island, Florida. She's frugal and has a conservative grip on spending but he doesn't mind going over budget to get what he wants, so agreeing on a home won't be easy.

programme.title: House Hunters: Hoping for a Unicorn in DC
programme.desc: Focuses on the emotional experience of finding and purchasing a new home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Building Battle in Arkansas
programme.desc: Focuses on the emotional experience of finding and purchasing a new home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Ageless Charm or Turnkey in Alabama
programme.desc: Two lawyers are starting their careers and their lives together in Montgomery, Alabama. He wants a house with timeless charm, while she makes a case for the practicality of newer and turnkey.

programme.title: House Hunters: Two Days to Find a House in Georgia
programme.desc: A couple comes to Warner Robins, GA, for the weekend to buy a house after his retirement from the military. She's been waiting years for this opportunity to purchase their dream home, but it won't be easy to find in two days.

programme.title: House Hunters: Needing a New Build in Nashville
programme.desc: A couple relocating from Chattanooga to Nashville is on the hunt for a large family home. She's looking for something stately that's closer to the city, while he wants a newer place in a suburban planned community.

programme.title: House Hunters: Left Brain vs. Right Brain in Tampa
programme.desc: A creative-type and a left-brained scientist couple search for a home in Tampa, Florida. One wants a turnkey Mediterranean, while the other pushes for a mid-century modern fixer-upper.

programme.title: House Hunters: Close to Coffee in Columbus
programme.desc: Two recent transplants to Columbus, Ohio, are ready to buy a house. While he wants a condo in an urban neighborhood so he can walk to get coffee, she wants a large house in the suburbs with a formal dining room so they can host Thanksgiving.

programme.title: House Hunters: Big Plans in Ohio
programme.desc: A recently engaged couple is ready to plan their wedding and buy a home together in Columbus, Ohio. He's hoping to keep the cost low so they can keep their current lifestyle but she's willing to push the budget if it means getting everything she wants.

programme.title: House Hunters: Big Ballin' in Seattle
programme.desc: A pro football player and his wife are ready to upgrade to a bigger home for their growing family in Seattle. He's looking for luxuries like heated floors and a huge game room, but she wants something more homey and practical.

programme.title: House Hunters: Bougie vs. Humble in Louisiana
programme.desc: A young couple and their daughter are ready to purchase their first home in Mandeville, Louisiana. She wants a big, fancy place to show off how far they've come, but he wants a more modest home in the country that's closer to work.

programme.title: House Hunters: The Deal vs. the Feel

programme.title: The Skill Code: RX: Distance and Direction
programme.desc: Cameron McCormick, 2015 PGA Teacher of the Year, provides a prescription and remedy to gain more distance off the tee and help those who suffer from a limited range of motion.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer: Sandy Lyle
programme.desc: Known as a golf prodigy from the age of nine, Sandy Lyle was a rising star in the game of golf and turned pro in 1977 at the age of 19. However, over the years his game became temperamental with highs and lows. See how Sandy Lyle overcame his obstacles.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer: Tiger Woods
programme.desc: Tiger Woods talks candidly about his 20-year career in The Open. Included are insights into the relationship with his parents, the impact of his father's death, breaking records and what the future holds.

programme.desc: Dr. Michelle Oakley shows her daughter Sierra the ins and outs of working with both house pets and wild animals, all part of her job as a veterinarian in the Yukon Territory.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet: Northern Disclosure: Dog Days of Winter
programme.desc: In the days leading up to Dr. Michelle Oakley’s work at a Yukon sled dog race, she handles a variety of patients, including some very fast sled dogs. On race day Michelle plunges in, examining a long stream of athletic dogs.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet: Northern Disclosure: Four Flying Reindeer
programme.desc: The Quebec caribou population is on the brink of extinction, and veterinarian Michelle Oakley may know how to save it.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet: Northern Disclosure: Coyote Crisis
programme.desc: Michelle Oakley races to save the lives of pets attacked by vicious Yukon predators.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet: Northern Disclosure: Spring Fever

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Vet and Wild
programme.desc: In an enhanced episode, Dr. Pol receives an emergency call from a client who finds her horse down and fears he may not make it. And, we revisit the clinics 30th anniversary celebration.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Up Sheep's Creek
programme.desc: We re-visit Dr. Pol on the farm as he goes to take blood samples from a flock of sheep. Its not as easy as it sounds, Dr. Pol and Charles must wrestle them first.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Whoa Mama!
programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, we revisit Mothers Day, Pol style. Its only fitting that Dr. Brenda successfully deliver twin calves on a farm call and a horse breeder receives good news that his mares are pregnant.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Holy Bat Attack!
programme.desc: In an enhanced episode we see its another emotional day for Dr. Pol and his team that starts even before the clinic opens in the early morning hours, Dr. Pol mistook a bat for a rotten banana peel and got bitten.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Snakes
programme.desc: Revealing the secrets behind some of the world's deadliest predators on the planet from snakes that strike without warning to others that move at blinding speed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Secrets of the Deep
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeology investigates the mysterious seas and rivers that are home to ancient Egypt's greatest relics. Special access to new, ground-breaking research reveals the secrets of long-lost treasures hidden by water and time.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Confessions of a Sea Monster
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates brand-new evidence from cutting-edge scientific missions into the alleged lair of the ocean's most infamous monster, and with the help of the latest discoveries, experts uncover lurid secrets of this underwater beast.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: New discoveries in the Amazon are revealing evidence of a long-lost civilization that built giant cities of untold treasures. With the help of the latest tech and cutting-edge archaeology, experts investigate the clues these mysterious people left behind.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Confessions of a Sea Monster
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates brand-new evidence from cutting-edge scientific missions into the alleged lair of the ocean's most infamous monster, and with the help of the latest discoveries, experts uncover lurid secrets of this underwater beast.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Secrets in the Jungle
programme.desc: New discoveries in the Amazon are revealing evidence of a long-lost civilization that built giant cities of untold treasures. With the help of the latest tech and cutting-edge archaeology, experts investigate the clues these mysterious people left behind.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Sunken Treasures
programme.desc: Egypt's ultimate secrets could be hidden underwater, and a cutting-edge archaeological investigation uses hi-tech methods to scan the ocean floor in search of sunken sphinxes, temples, and shipwrecks.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: When a vivacious young escort, Shannan Gilbert, vanishes on Long Island's south shore in 2010, her disappearance leads police to discover the bodies of ten other victims dumped by a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Long Island Serial Killer: New Revelations
programme.desc: The discovery of four women's bodies on Gilgo Beach was just the beginning. But who is the Long Island Serial Killer? Investigators uncover multiple suspects and shocking theories, as they race to capture this prolific killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: She Gave No Warning
programme.desc: When two young women vanish without a trace, investigators are haunted by the things they leave behind - a car with the keys still in the ignition, a pair of shoes and a coat. They disappear with no warning.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Young Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: They are head over heels in love with their whole lives ahead still ahead of them, but then they die suddenly under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: She Gave No Warning
programme.desc: When two young women vanish without a trace, investigators are haunted by the things they leave behind - a car with the keys still in the ignition, a pair of shoes and a coat. They disappear with no warning.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Young Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: They are head over heels in love with their whole lives ahead still ahead of them, but then they die suddenly under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Secrets in the Cars
programme.desc: After a night out with friends, 20-year-old Jaleayah Davis is found dead in the midst of a horrifying scene. And 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, drives two hours to show her boyfriend a sonogram of the baby, but never makes it home.

programme.title: See No Evil: We See You, Kelsey
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears from a Kansas Mall. The only clue for detectives are the haunting final images of her on surveillance video. Somewhere in these frames hides the answer and a killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: View to a Rampage
programme.desc: A couple, just engaged, is found brutally murdered in a car. To investigators it looks like an execution. No leads until a surveillance camera 90 miles away gives the investigation its first break - a killer bent on revenge. It's a race against time.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Tragedy on TV
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the events surrounding the murder of Alison Parker and Adam Ward who were shot on live TV. 20/20 shares all new details from the 23-page suicide note Bryce Williams sent as well as a look inside the mind of the killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Trust and Treachery
programme.desc: Abe Shakespeare had a lottery jackpot worth millions, and an even bigger heart. What he didn't have was the ability to spot a swindler plotting to take his money, and his life. And a small town is plagued by fires, and shocked to learn who set them.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What If
programme.desc: 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, newly pregnant, has vanished while visiting her on-again-off-again boyfriend. Her mother's desperate search leads to a disturbing connection with another mother miles away.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: Betrayed: Dying to be Popular
programme.desc: Becky Stowe is an eager 15-year-old looking for love. When she suddenly disappears, friends and family wonder if love finally found her, or if it was something far more sinister.

programme.title: Betrayed: Suited for Murder
programme.desc: After two kids and two divorces, Charleston, West Virginia native Kathy Goble was making herself a priority for the first time in her life. However, her carefree ways soon catch up to her and she is betrayed in the most brutal way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: Strangled by Love
programme.desc: Pretty, vivacious Dana Laskowski is busy juggling a boyfriend, a jealous ex-husband, a secret lover, and, most importantly, single mom responsibilities. She feels she's finally found the right balance when her life is cut short by someone close.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A teenage party at the edge of the city turns horrific after the discovery of a woman's corpse. Detectives easily surmise that she was strangled with her own shoelace, but figuring out her identity proves difficult.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. As days go by with no sign of the baby or demands for ransom, sergeants Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she's been sold on the black market or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff's deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight. When he's found dead in his patrol car the next morning, his fellow lawmen must set aside their grief and hunt down his killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty. Police conduct an all-out manhunt and discover the gunman is even more dangerous than they'd thought.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: 18th Street
programme.desc: Lou joins 18th Street gangsters, in prison and on the street, to learn why their deadly rivalry with the MS-13 is devastating El Salvador.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Waterfront Builds

programme.title: Yardcore: Vintage French Country Garden
programme.desc: A yard that begins as nothing but dirt and damaged flagstone is completely transformed with an eco-friendly deck, a pergola, a travertine firebox, rustic stenciled pews and a large sandblasted dining table illuminated by a blingy chandelier.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Century Ago
programme.desc: When Jennifer and Paul's home inspection report came back with only minor repairs, Paul tackled them with enthusiasm. It was not long before they began to suspect that the home inspector had missed some much bigger problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: Andrew and Melissa had a home inspection before they bought the house, but the inspector missed signs of obvious neglect that could lead directly to much bigger issues.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: No Breathing Room
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report. After moving in they discover problems that made parts of the house off limits.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heating It Up In Hawaii
programme.desc: Things are heating up in Hawaii which inspires Roger Mooking to do some island-hopping for the best eats. On Oahu, Hawaii, Roger and farmer Daniel Anthony heat up an imu, a traditional underground oven, for a feast of cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)
programme.desc: Gina is offered a job in New York and Martin, taking advice from Stan, tells her to take it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Will is stranded in a mountain forest with his new girlfriend's disagreeable father.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: M Is for the Many Things She Gave Me
programme.desc: When Philip's former college girlfriend comes to visit, she attempts to seduce Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mother's Day
programme.desc: When Jazz and his wife try unsuccessfully to become pregnant, they ask for Will's help.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: While vacationing in Will's hometown, the Banks family learns a secret about Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Client
programme.desc: Will discovers that Ashley has the gift of singing and pursues a music career for her.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: What's Will Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Will starts wheeling and dealing as Ashley's manager until she develops an enormous ego.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love for New York
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony, they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash talking until Chamo delivers a 'New York Note.' The next challenge will test the guys on their earning potential; New York likes to spend money so she needs a man who can bring home the bacon.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys; it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build doghouses for NY's Chihuhua, Her Majesty. Some teams work together well but others fight.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She invites her friend Tamara Moore from the WNBA to put her men to the test and the best man wins a date with NY. One of the guys ends up in the hospital.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine. But first, she has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: A woman is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, her luck begins to turn around.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Bridesmaid
programme.desc: A woman is focused on taking over her family business, instead of looking for a man. All her friends are getting married and she seems to get new invitations in the mail weekly. While at a wedding, she meets a documentarian, and he changes her life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's undisciplined 14-year-old grandson's visit gives new meaning to generation gap.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: Frasier: Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: When Daphne breaks up with her boyfriend, Niles feels ready to declare his feelings for her. Frasier convinces him it could be a mistake, until Daphne has an encounter with a Niles-like man at a singles bar.

programme.title: Frasier: A Lilith Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Lilith summons Frasier to Boston during Thanksgiving for an interview with Frederick.

programme.title: Frasier: Our Father Whose Art Ain't Heaven
programme.desc: Martin misinterprets Frasier's polite compliment of a painting and buys it for his son. Frasier struggles with his feelings of disappointment and decides to follow Niles' lead of telling him directly.

programme.title: Frasier: Dad Loves Sherry, the Boys Just Whine
programme.desc: After Maureen breaks up with him, Martin asks out someone he's had his eye on. Much to Frasier and Niles' horror, she is a loud, brassy banjo-playing waitress. Frasier and Niles cover up their true feelings, until Sherry takes Daphne's banquet ticket.

programme.title: Frasier: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Martin is appalled when Frasier admits he pulled a prank in prep school and blamed it on a bully, who was expelled because of the incident. Out of guilt, Frasier tracks the man down and visits him in prison, but has trouble confessing the truth.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Days of the Condo
programme.desc: When his request to install a doorknocker is denied, Frasier challenges the condo association president, Ms. Langer, by running against her in the election.

programme.title: Frasier: Death and the Dog
programme.desc: When Eddie becomes lethargic and refuses to eat, Martin tries everything to perk him up. He hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of this depression.

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier's spontaneous gesture of sharing a table with two beautiful women leads them to a double date at a country cabin. Frasier then tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he's betraying Maris.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Don Juan Is Shelved
programme.desc: Lucy launches an all-out campaign to keep her husband, Ricky, in Hollywood.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Bull Fight Dance
programme.desc: Lucy is tricked into accepting the role of a bull on a television show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Hollywood Anniversary
programme.desc: Ricky tells Lucy that he has a big party planned in a famous nightclub.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Star Upstairs
programme.desc: Star-struck, Lucy plots with a hotel bellhop to meet Cornell Wilde in a Hollywood hotel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Gabriel Iglesias, Cree Cicchino, Fabrizio Zacharee Guido and Andy Andrews visit. Then, Baker Rosie Daykin whips up coffee meringue sandwiches.

programme.title: Movie: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A bride-to-be who is planning her wedding with a well-off doctor at a beautiful resort meets a charming local. She must decide which man she should be with: the man that can provide for her or the man that understands her.

programme.title: Movie: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: Following a proposal, a man reveals he is the prince of a small country called St. Ives, and he needs his disapproving parents' blessing in order to marry.

programme.title: Movie: Nature of Love
programme.desc: A city girl is writing a magazine feature on a glamping resort where she faces her fears and tries out the camp's activities with the help of a handsome outdoorsman.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek x Craig
programme.desc: The Asian girls in school are drawing dreamy pictures of Tweek and Craig.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Butt and Pancake Head
programme.desc: One of Cartman's body parts becomes famous overnight and rivals the popularity of another superstar.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 24, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants
programme.desc: The kids of South Park have raised money to send to children of Afghanistan, but the Government believes the Afghani children's thank you gift is contaminated with Anthrax and the boys are forced to take it back to Afghanistan.

programme.title: South Park: The Snuke
programme.desc: When a new Muslim student joins the class, Cartman immediately suspects him of being a terrorist. Plus, the town is visited by Hillary Clinton.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 24, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer
programme.desc: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Harvey-Woodruff Family
programme.desc: The big reveal is right around the corner.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Manhattan Project
programme.desc: When an apartment becomes available in Manhattan, Carrie finally sees her dream of living in the city coming true but Doug has different plans and the two quickly realize they share a different outlook on the future.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Single Spaced
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie visit their priest for some marriage counselling, they run into friends who recently had a child, which causes both of them to think about adopting a baby.

programme.title: The King of Queens: China Syndrome
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's marriage continues to be on the rocks when Doug learns that Carrie didn't get rid of her apartment. Both need to set aside their differences when they receive an unexpected phone call that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The King of Queens: China Syndrome
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's marriage continues to be on the rocks when Doug learns that Carrie didn't get rid of her apartment. Both need to set aside their differences when they receive an unexpected phone call that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pilot
programme.desc: Doug is the envy of his neighbourhood when Carrie surprises him with a big-screen TV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fat City
programme.desc: Doug is worried that Carrie has put on a few pounds and may wind up resembling her mother.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Doug worries when Carrie's new job in a posh Manhattan law firm keeps her working late.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Richie's Song
programme.desc: Carrie refuses to double date with Richie and his obnoxious cheating wife, Marie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paternal Affairs
programme.desc: Doug is horrified when Arthur asks permission to 'woo' his Aunt Sheila when she visits.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Disease Detectives
programme.desc: The CDC Disease Detectives investigate several emergency room patients with strange infections.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Ghost Ship of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Josh tackles the mystery of The Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. With a state-of-the-art submarine, Josh dives to find a ship so elusive that it's known as 'The Holy Grail of Shipwrecks'.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Great Women of Egypt
programme.desc: Josh journeys through the land of the Nile to uncover the secrets of three of the most powerful, and most elusive, women in ancient Egypt: Hatshepsut, Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: In the second installment of an epic two-part investigation, Josh continues his journey through Egypt to uncover the secrets, and possibly the final resting place, of ancient history's most powerful women rulers Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Lost Tomb of the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt, where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery: the mummy of an ancient High Priest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Show Me the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates returns to Egypt from the comfort of his home office to interview special guests Xena's Lucy Lawless, Top Chef's Padma Lakshmi and Ocean's Eleven director Steven Soderbergh. Josh explores what it takes to walk like an Egyptian mummy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes inside a cutting-edge archaeological investigation that is unearthing brand-new discoveries about Noah's Ark. As experts get closer to finding its final resting place, they reveal the long-lost secrets of this famous vessel.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Lost Tomb of the Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates heads to an active dig site in Egypt, where he joins famous archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass on the cusp of an incredible discovery: the mummy of an ancient High Priest.
