programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: Following two activists separated by fifty years who made it their mission to save the beloved and often misunderstood majestically tigers.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Grady and Bill are dropped onto a glacial volcanic peak in the Chilean Andes, where they face 70 mph winds, heavy snowfall, and sub-freezing temperatures. Hunkering down in cave shelters, they risk noxious gases and struggle to get fire.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Long Way Home
programme.desc: Stranded in Chile, Grady and Bill struggle to get fire in the damp rainforest, setting ego and survival protocol on a collision course that tests this new team. Only a successful primitive fire and hunt can reset the clock on their survival.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of the Amazon, Grady and Bill climb ancient trees and commune with animals to navigate through the jungle in search of a river that could lead them to salvation. But the jungle heat and humidity pushes them to their breaking point.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Shipwrecked
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves on a deserted island off the coast of Nova Scotia, in the middle of winter. They have only a few items with them for survival, some knives and an emergency blanket, and they need to build a shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Failed Ascent
programme.desc: Cody and Dave have encountered their worst nightmare, being trapped on top of a mountain in New Zealand. They must make their way down safely through the glacial peaks and deadly crevasses and use Cody's knowledge of the local culture to find food.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Air
programme.desc: Stranded in the high altitudes of the Peruvian Andes, Grady and Josh battle crippling altitude sickness and the hallucinations that come with it. They must find fresh water fast in order to navigate this rough landscape in pursuit of civilization.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Desert Breakdown
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head to Peru's 'Valley of the Volcanoes' to take on a lost-in -the-desert scenario. They are thrown into a lava-scorched land with few survival resources.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Panic in the Jungle
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on a lost hiker scenario in the sweltering jungles of Laos. The two must bushwhack their way through dense terrain equipped with items a backpacker might carry: a 35 mm camera, condoms and a pack of cigarettes.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamped
programme.desc: Cody and Dave head out to the Louisiana swamps to spend some time with the snakes and gators.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Split Up
programme.desc: Dave and Cody find themselves in a nightmarish scenario they are miles apart in the jungle. They must trek through the tough terrain to find each other and make their way to civilization.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dominic's Story
programme.desc: Dominic's life is falling apart due to his food addiction. At over 600-lbs, living in a van with his brother, Dominic decides to leave California for Texas, where only Dr. Now can help him learn to face life's challenges without using food to cope.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Angela's Story
programme.desc: When Angela's family is unable to accompany her on her weight-loss journey to Texas she is unsure what to do. At the last minute, she reaches out to an old flame, Eric, who still has love for her and is willing to make the trip.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Thinks Max's Future Is on the Line

programme.title: Full House: The Dating Game

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Mail/ Pups Save a Frog Mayor
programme.desc: The postman's truck gets stuck in the mud, and the mail gets stuck in a tree. Mayor Goodway turns into a frog.

programme.desc: Rubble leads the pups in building an emergency landing pad for Captain Gordy in this Ultimate Construction Rescue; Mayor Goodway, Danny, and the Turbots are stuck in a canyon in the mountains.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Ocean Patrol!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Gliding Turbots/ Pups Save a Plane
programme.desc: Francois and Cap'n Turbot fly way off course; Mayor Goodway has an eventful flying lesson.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Pit Crew/ Pups Fight Fire

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Space Rock/ Pups Save a Good Mayor

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blind Justice
programme.desc: The guys get a little punchy while giving boxing lessons, then head to the mall to share the gift of music with strangers. When tonight’s loser delivers the right speech to the wrong audience, he’s the one who gets scared straight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The guys teach a crash course in sorry behaviour, ask strangers to settle bizarre debates and spread surprisingly good news at the mall. Plus, tonight’s loser has his hands tied when a day at the park turns into a frightful mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hopeless and Changeless
programme.desc: The guys head to the park asking strangers to agree with their bizarre points of view, then give classless lessons about real estate. Plus, tonight's loser finds himself in a harrowing race to the finish at the racetrack.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies

programme.desc: Amy shows us how to prepare for a first date, by preparing for a first date. Amy prepares a meal, crafts a special gift and enlists Chassie for a makeover. She also talks flower arrangements with Patty Hogg.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: First Dates

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys Take London
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.desc: When one half of a magic troop vanishes, Danny and Ed search for the missing sorceress.

programme.desc: Sin City screeches to a halt as a massive power outage brings darkness to the strip.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Produce and Cons
programme.desc: In the first game, the chefs are only allowed to shop in the middle aisles to make their vegetarian feast. Then, the chefs must master surf and turf on a budget.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hunting the Hunters

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Officer McDermott finds an abandoned truck, sparking a winding investigation. Officer Holmes and Sgt. Lucas rescue paddlers of a capsized canoe. Later, Holmes responds to a moose accident, while OFC. Frye consoles a bereft woman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Excuses, Excuses
programme.desc: Hunting season heats up as Warden Herring calls in the air wing to track illegal activity on a game preserve. Warden Blanchard catches an intentional violator red-handed. Wardens Carter and McBrine execute a search warrant on a known poacher.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossed Wires
programme.desc: McKenney and Robertson investigate a night hunting complaint. MacCabe tracks an illegal bear kill back to the source. K9 Tundra takes the lead in the harrowing search for a missing elderly man with dementia.

programme.title: North Woods Law: High Jinks
programme.desc: The wardens battle illegal marijuana across the state. It is dangerous work that often sees armed individuals protecting their land. Three teens are involved in an ATV crash that has the wardens stumped.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Outfoxed
programme.desc: The start of the busy tourist season has the wardens out in full force. A dangerous fox is on the loose in a crowded campground-the wardens need to find it fast. An ATV rider appears to have been partying too hard and nearly causes a wipe out.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Toxic Invader

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Return of the Outback Beast

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Italy's Lake Monster

programme.desc: Jaeda lives in a house that lacks storage so the basement is a dumping ground for clothes, boxes and bins full of items she's forgotten she owns. Jason and Kelly have an overflowing playroom full of toys the kids have outgrown, but she can't let go.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Perfect Pair Ready for a Perfect Pad
programme.desc: Newlyweds Michelle and Jon are determined to move out of his parents' basement and into a forever home of their own. Their ample budget and their real estate dreams are out of step with the market.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mid-Century Bedroom Revival
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles one of her biggest challenges yet. She tackles all of the original bedrooms in the home built by her grandparents. The previous owners trashed the original and design, now it's up to her to fix their mistakes.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Reclaiming the Rec Room
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the basement. With space at a premium, Nicole must battle water, structural problems, dilapidated windows, and poorly placed duct work to turn a neglected area into a much needed gathering space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Reborn
programme.desc: After an improperly winterized basement bathroom springs some serious leaks, Nicole remains determined to rebuild the bathroom better than ever. She also adds an egress window to the basement and builds out a basement guest suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: One Extraordinary Exterior
programme.desc: Nicole adds gutters, a new driveway and entirely does the house in stucco like the original. To complete this magnificent transformation Nicole restores the original brick front porch and tops everything off with some tasteful, but stunning landscaping.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Roof Renovation Donation
programme.desc: Nicole is back on Campbell Street helping her 85-year-old veteran neighbour, Art, repair his home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Red Barn Reborn
programme.desc: Nicole takes on her most personal project yet, her grandfather's red barn. The barn has fallen into disrepair and requires a great deal of structural work to make it safe and strong.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1910 Arts and Crafts Family Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1910 arts and crafts farmhouse for a family who relocates from the big city to the countryside of Cherry Valley, California. They hope to become organic farmers and want to include elements for the family farm and business.

programme.title: Jessie: Panic Attack Room

programme.title: Jessie: Break-Up and Shape-Up
programme.desc: Jessie becomes threatened when Tony has to train a beautiful girl named Victoria as a doorman. Things get messy when Jessie's old boyfriend Ted comes to town and she finds herself attracted to him.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express

programme.title: Raven's Home: Disorder in the Court

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Skate-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Steal-A-Rooney

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Presidents and Problems
programme.desc: Following the last show of Austin’s tour, the gang does some sight-seeing at a Washington, D.C., museum, where Austin accidentally gets stuck to a priceless object and must find a way to return it before performing for the president.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Beach Clubs and BFFs
programme.desc: Trish becomes jealous after she convinces herself that Ally has a new best friend.

programme.title: Bunk'd: No Bones About It

programme.title: The Planets: Pluto: The Secret Science
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores the dwarf planet Pluto, a tiny frozen world surrounded in secrets. Using the latest science, he investigates the possibility of life in its mysterious ocean.

programme.title: The Planets: Mars: The Definitive Guide
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the answers to some of the greatest mysteries on the Red Planet. Using the most detailed survey of Mars ever created, he discovers the dark history of our closest neighbor.

programme.title: The Planets: Venus: The Hell Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Venus, a hellish planet covered in active volcanoes and dense clouds. Using cutting-edge technology, he decodes the secrets beneath this volatile planet and investigates if Earth could be heading towards the same fate.

programme.title: The Planets: Saturn: Mysteries Among the Rings
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the mysterious secrets of Saturn and its rings. Using the latest science from the Cassini mission, he explores the planet's giant icy geysers, powerful hurricanes, and the moon that may be hiding extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: The Planets: Jupiter: King of the Planets
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino leads a journey to Jupiter, the biggest and most extreme planet in our Solar System. Using new discoveries and the latest science, he investigates Jupiter's deepest mysteries and if it is actually our Sun's secret twin.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin
programme.desc: Two suns photographed in the sky over Indonesia could be a trick of light, or the first sighting of the Sun's evil twin; NASA scientists are baffled by ghostly white swirls on the Moon's surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn't come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing. As the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds. Then an unprecedented discovery spurs police to open up a century old murder investigation.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Cold Feet
programme.desc: 24-year-old Yale PHD student, Annie Le, goes missing. CCTV shows Annie arrive at Yale, but she is not seen leaving. All evidence points to something happening to Annie inside. Police search every inch of the building, until they find something horrific.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Cruel and Unusual
programme.desc: When a missing Punjabi mother is found murdered, Delta Police Detective Harj Sidhu must take a hard look into members of his own community to find answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: On November 7, 2014, 69-year old Ina Clare Richardson is found brutally murdered in a public park in Clarkston, Washington. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras to piece together the puzzle of her fateful final night.

programme.title: See No Evil: Cold Feet
programme.desc: 24-year-old Yale PHD student, Annie Le, goes missing. CCTV shows Annie arrive at Yale, but she is not seen leaving. All evidence points to something happening to Annie inside. Police search every inch of the building, until they find something horrific.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Cruel and Unusual
programme.desc: When a missing Punjabi mother is found murdered, Delta Police Detective Harj Sidhu must take a hard look into members of his own community to find answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Nurse
programme.desc: Bright young nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. An old friend of hers points a finger at Michelle's ex-boyfriend. Cops discover footage that shows Michelle's car driving around the parking lot where she vanished, but who is the driver?

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: A Deceitful Heart
programme.desc: When Michael Lee Smith's body is found shot, partially nude, and dumped on the side of the road, the town of Berkley, Michigan is scandalized. Police are forced to sift through lies and alibis as they attempt to track down the killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell Hounds
programme.desc: A woman in Dayton, Ohio welcomes a young family when they move into the long derelict house next door. But escalating fights over everything from treatment of pets to treatment of children leads to a violent, bloody, and deadly confrontation.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: My House, My Revenge
programme.desc: A couple moves to an idyllic California beach town and hits it off with their new neighbors. The wives are particularly friendly, until one of them descends into drugs and madness, terrorizing and turning murderous intent upon the other.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: A Place She'd Call Home
programme.desc: Police are baffled when Melissa White is found murdered in the backyard of her Viola, Illinois home. But when investigators take a closer look at Melissa's neighbors, they unearth a secret. Could this be the key to apprehending Melissa's murderer?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Shadow Walker
programme.desc: Sandi Musk thinks dating Andy LeFleur is a welcomed distraction from her ongoing divorce. But when it becomes clear he wants more than she's ready to give, she tries to call things off. Thing is, this is one guy who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: Everyone loves 25-year-old Sandy Jeffers, but little does she know that one man is completely obsessed with her. When she finally comes face to face with her stalker, the events that follow are twisted, torturous, and ultimately fatal.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Unexpected Company
programme.desc: Reggie and Carol Sumner live in Florida where the 61-year-old retirees have recently settled into a more relaxed lifestyle. But when they mysteriously go missing after a visit from a former neighbor, investigators have to wonder if they left on their own.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Luxury Deck with a Dog Staircase
programme.desc: Newlyweds Whitney and Joey have just purchased their dream home in an exclusive gated community, but the existing deck has some serious issues. It's old, rotting and doesn't fit their needs. Plus, their aging dog is having trouble using the stairs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Pirate Treasure Pool
programme.desc: Kelly Caviness and his team build two spectacular pools. The first is a modern, kid-friendly retreat for Mike, Lisa and their 2 children. The other pool is an epic pirate-themed water park complete with a hidden treasure room and animatronic pirates.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Sliding Into Paradise
programme.desc: A young Tennessee family's steep backyard has made it impossible to enjoy. Kyle and Justin build a family fun zone that includes a waterfall, a fire pit, and a custom waterslide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cancun in Every Corner
programme.desc: The kings pull out all the stops to maximize an Orange County family's backyard. The shady and dated space is transformed into a three-tiered vacation paradise the family can enjoy at home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ponds Have More Fun
programme.desc: A Texas family wants a one-of-a-kind, natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys prove they are masters of the country pond when they build an expansive creek waterfall, natural rock steps, sunken boulders and custom concealed skimmers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Sunny Anderson and Alton Brown discuss dishes that were unexpectedly good.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Grilled
programme.desc: See the most delicious meat to ever hit the grill; Mongolian Pork Chop and Diver Scallops.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City Of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five Bbq Chicken Favorites
programme.desc: Roger Mooking has plucked his way through plenty of barbecue chicken, but only the very best birds make this list of his top five favourites.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals
programme.desc: Roger's learning to rig up and roast whole animals with some truly wild techniques. First he'll learn an ancient Argentine method of roasting lamb upright over coals by hanging them on cast iron crosses in the open air.

programme.title: Man Fire Food
programme.desc: Host Roger Mooking explores the inventive ways Americans cook with fire.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Milwaukee
programme.desc: Milwaukee may be known for its beer, but it's also home to mouth-watering classic American foods. From cheese curds and bratwurst to frozen custard and butter burgers, Andrew shows us why this Midwestern city is a great food town.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.desc: Luna Girl uses her Luna Beam to create a giant evil moonflower. If Gekko doesn't learn how to stop being distracted he won't be able to stop Romeo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Ukulele Jam / Grandpa vs. Grandpa
programme.desc: While participating in a Ukulele Jam, Donald loses Mickey's special ukulele. The Happy Helpers are judges for a Hawaiian surfing contest and learn about a lifelong rivalry!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Tricky Ticket/ Gekko and the Missing Gekko-Mobile
programme.desc: Catboy only has two tickets to the Jayden Houston concert and has to decide which of his best friends to take. Gekko loses the Gekko-Mobile just when they need it the most.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Luna's Cosmic Tantrum/ Motsuki The Best
programme.desc: Motsuki becomes Owelette's sidekick; Motsuki traps Luna Girl on the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Vampirina: Acrobat Boris/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: Boris gets an invitation to reunite with an acorbatic flying troupe. Vee and Poppy run a lemonade stand.

programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.desc: In order to earn Clubhouse Camp Out Badges Mickey and his pals pair up with a buddy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Playmate
programme.desc: Mickey and pals teach a visitor some new tricks for his debut in Mickey's Circus.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Silly Problem
programme.desc: When the Clubhouse's Silly Switch gets stuck on silly, everything turns silly.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Special Delivery
programme.desc: Donald gets upset when all of his friends get mail, but he doesn't get any.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Grand Food Truck Rally/ Cuckoo La-La
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals race in a grand food truck rally in Paris. While in Paris, the happy helpers help famous fashion designer Cuckoo La-La with a fashion show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle

programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moth on the Moon/ Fly Me to the Moon
programme.desc: A crystal has hatched a new villain on the moon; Gekko confiscates Luna Girl and Motsuki's powers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Win a Twin/ Skeeter and the Super Girls
programme.desc: When Skeeter volunteers to help Miss Nanny bake, her twin, Scooter, isn't sure he can have fun playing without her. Then, Skeeter is excited to save the day with Super Fabulous and Captain Ice Cube, but doesn't think she can be a superhero with glasses.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Summer Camp/ Blabber Mouth
programme.desc: The Chipmunks help an owner fix up his run-down summer camp and his broken relationship with his brother. Alvin is convinced that Theodore has cursed him to never lie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: Alvin, Simon and Theodore are under their cousin Toby's care. Upon returning to school, they are tasked with winning a music competition whose cash prize will save the school's music department. They find competition in the form of the Chipettes.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Pilot
programme.desc: When teacher Molly Flynn hears Officer Mike Biggs 'share' at an Overeaters Anonymous meeting, she's instantly smitten and invites him to come speak to her fourth grade class.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: McMillan and Mom
programme.desc: Carl, Mike and Samuel take a road trip to Memphis to meet Carl's mother for the first time.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Hard-Ass Teacher
programme.desc: Eve has decided she wants to go to college at West Point. In order to do so she needs to get straight A's, which might be a problem considering her geometry teacher, Mr. Hardin, is very tough.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Parenting Bud
programme.desc: After Mike notices a bump on Bud's head, Bud explains that he was jumped the other night while unloading his truck at the pot shop. Later, Vanessa talks with the girls about their responsibility to care for her and Mike when they reach a certain age.

programme.title: Black-ish: Christmas in Theater Eight
programme.desc: The Johnsons have a tradition of going to the movies on Christmas and they can never agree on what to see. Dre wants to see an important film about Rosa Parks, but they all want to see the latest action-packed superhero blockbuster.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people. Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Clarke and her friends find themselves on a planet that is not what it seems.

programme.title: Bulletproof: Episode 3
programme.desc: The search for a missing girl leads Bishop and Pike to Amsterdam, where they find themselves at the heart of a large human-trafficking operation run by the Markides family.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wallet
programme.desc: Jerry has to explain to his parents why he isn't wearing the watch they gave him.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Gum
programme.desc: Kramer persuades everyone to try a stick of his nervous friend's Chinese gum. Elaine accidentally reveals herself to Kramer and his rattled friend, Lloyd.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Doctor Has a Cow Puppet
programme.desc: Alan finally succumbs to Judith's demand that he take Jake to therapy and realizes he has been sleepwalking. After Evelyn tells Charlie that Alan used to sleepwalk as a child, Charlie believes he has a solution.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Jackie Likes Star Trek
programme.desc: After Adam and Jackie disagree over their Halloween costumes, Murray teaches Adam to be a shell of a man to keep Jackie happy.

programme.title: Mom: Hepatitis and Lemon Zest
programme.desc: Bonnie is furious when Christy's poor financial decisions threaten the family's living situation. Also, Christy agrees to help out Jill, a woman who is newly sober.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Not Broke Parents
programme.desc: When Deke invites Max and Caroline to join him and his parents for dinner at their home, Max is tongue-tied until his mother confides in her about her secret past.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Right to Choose
programme.desc: After trying unsuccessfully to get pregnant, Melanie and Derwin visit a fertility specialist. Meanwhile, Jenna refuses to take Malik back and the Sabers court a new quarterback. Tasha runs into her dying boyfriend and is devastated.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Maz Jobrani.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Perkins vs. Gusman
programme.desc: A divorced couple plan to wed for a second time, but the Bride-To-Be wants to make sure her ex-husband has left his cheating ways in the past.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Law-va Bomb/ Loaning From the Heart
programme.desc: An unexpected injury on a tour boat; Woman sues her aunt over an unpaid loan.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Snap Back/ Kodak Moment
programme.desc: A woman claims a weight-loss product was a bust; a photoshopped image damages a woman’s reputation.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Thomas / Sherman vs. Castello
programme.desc: A woman from Texas believes her aunt is blinded by grief on the paternity of child born after her brother’s death.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Stand Up Dad
programme.desc: A father and son argue over the cost of baseball tickets.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Can't Twerk Your Way Out
programme.desc: Frenchie wants to escalate her relationship with internet sensation Jet Wavy. She’s here today to let him and his groupies know that they are exclusive.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her former friend for breach of contract and a loan, and says he’s a struggling meth addict who owes her money. Her friend says he is now living in a sober house and doesn’t owe her anything.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'This Guy Is All Wet' and ' Striking Out.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Filing A False Report ' and 'Not Telling.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Bald and the Beautiful/ Deboned Nuptials
programme.desc: Confrontation results in damages; bride sues caterer after choking on fishbone.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman says her ex-boyfriend wrecked her car; the ex-boyfriend says he made the payments for the car and owes nothing. Former friends are in court over cameras and equipment expenses. Parties dispute a car collision.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail... Again
programme.desc: Giovanni confessed to cheating on Meghan. Trisha believes that her boyfriend accuses her of cheating, because of his past infidelities. Stacey wants to prove her faithful to Steve so they can get married.

programme.title: Maury: Maury, After the Results... 15 Years Later!
programme.desc: We are rewinding the clock for some of the most outrageous clips from 2004 but we're also tracking them down and bringing them back to update you on what’s happened since then.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'm Psychic, He's Cheating
programme.desc: Gabby is positive her fiancé Woody is cheating on her. She says this is because she is a 3rd generation psychic, and knows he is cheating with a girl named Stackz.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Two years after the Las Vegas bachelor party, the guys head to Thailand for Stu's wedding. However, Stu's plans for a quiet brunch are derailed.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Kingdom Come
programme.desc: A houseful of quarrelsome relatives reluctantly gather together for a patriarch's funeral.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: A man's life begins to fall apart as he deals with a divorce and managing his children. After meeting and befriending a young bachelor he learns how to navigate the single life.

programme.title: Movie: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: A rookie detective is the first black police officer in his city's history, and it doesn't take long for him to tackle an incredible case: infiltrating the Ku Klux Klan. While he leads the investigation, he recruits a white detective to help.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Daze
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, a man is convinced he'll never fall in love again. His best friend dares him to propose to a waitress. The dare evolves into the kind of love that both have been looking for all along.

programme.title: Movie: Phat Girlz
programme.desc: A plus-size woman struggles to find love and acceptance as she pursues a career as a fashion designer.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur
programme.desc: A loveable millionaire risks it all when he falls in love with an irascible waitress.

programme.title: Movie: The Beautician and the Beast
programme.desc: A beautician from Queens is mistakenly recruited to tutor a foreign dictator's children.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Movie: Dick Tracy
programme.desc: Big Boy Caprice is reuniting the mob and Dick Tracy must stop him before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: They Came Together
programme.desc: A man's company threatens to run a woman's shop out of business, yet the two still fall in love. When things go south, the archetypal couple must overcome a series of classic hurdles in the rom-com genre before finding their way back to one another.

programme.title: Movie: Raising Arizona
programme.desc: An eccentric, childless couple decide to kidnap one baby from a set of quintuplets.
